name: calculate_cleaning_quote
description: Calculates the final price for a cleaning service based on property details, location, and extras. Use this tool whenever a user asks for a price quote.

p_bedrooms.description: Number of bedrooms in the house. Mandatory.

p_bathrooms.description: Number of bathrooms in the house. Mandatory.

p_city.description: City name to determine service area pricing (e.g., Alpharetta, Marietta).

p_cleaning_type.description: Type of cleaning service. Default is 'regular'. 'profunda' is Deep Cleaning, 'mudanca' is Move-in/Move-out.

p_has_pets.description: Whether there are pets in the house (adds a pet fee).

p_is_airbnb.description: Set to true if the property is an Airbnb listing.

p_is_saturday.description: Set to true if the service is requested for a Saturday.
